allow: PowerShell($apk = "D:\\Projects\\VStore\\android\\app\\build\\outputs\\apk\\debug\\app-debug.apk"; if \(Test-Path $apk\) { $f = Get-Item $apk; Write-Output "APK GENERADO:"; Write-Output "  Ruta: $\($f.FullName\)"; Write-Output "  Tamano: $\([math]::Round\($f.Length/1MB,2\)\) MB"; Write-Output "  Fecha: $\($f.LastWriteTime\)" } else { Write-Output "No se encontro el APK en $apk" })
